name: Jon Ossoff
subject: please read
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
This race is a TOSS-UP!
Hi there,
We're just over three weeks from Election Day, and this race is a **TOSS-UP!**
**I had a long briefing with the team last night, and our December grassroots fundraising is falling behind. I asked the team to set an immediate goal of raising $50,000 by midnight TONIGHT to get back on track, and that's why I'm reaching out to you directly.**
Mitch McConnell and his GOP mega-donor allies will do anything they can to stop me.
They're spending MILLIONS to save David Perdue and their Senate majority.
But our people-powered campaign is refusing donations from corporate PACs, so I need massive grassroots support *right now* to beat their dark money machine.
[**Look, we need a boost today. Can you split a donation of $3 or more before midnight?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc7a4/2a380d31/21de1d33/f058c0/1812976960/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0b3Nzb2ZmIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDEyMTVfb3Nzb2ZmX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4ossoff?refcode=e20201215_ossoff_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

Friend,

I promised you that we would MAKE CHRISTMAS GREAT AGAIN, and that’s exactly what we’ve done.

Recently, I signed an Executive Order to designate Christmas Eve as a Federal Holiday - something that should have been done long ago. Now, hard working Americans from around the Nation can enjoy more time with their family and loved ones during the Christmas season.

name: Mary Mancini
subject: The little engine that could...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
I think we can, I think we can, I know we can...
... raise the entire $20,000 goal by the end of the year – but only if we stay on track. Right now that means meeting our mid-month goal. Mid-month ends at midnight tonight, which means we should be halfway to reaching our goal. We need to raise another $7,080 by midnight to get there. Don’t forget, we have an extremely generous 100% match on all donations made up to $20,000 for the month of December. Please help us maximize this opportunity by donating today!
The whole purpose behind 4D (December Democratic Donor Drive) is to make sure we have the resources to capitalize on the momentum we’ve built. Election infrastructure isn’t built overnight. That’s why it’s so important for us to take advantage of this match opportunity.
Will you help us? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]

body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

Friend,

As hard as it is to fundraise right after a presidential election, the WVDP is doing everything we can to not fall behind. Today that means reaching out to you, and asking if you can help us reach our mid-month goal of $1,800 by midnight tonight.
We recognize that the best path to flipping seats in West Virginia is by ramping up our voter registration efforts. That’s how we flipped Georgia, and that’s how we can start flipping West Virginia. From phone bills and transportation to stamps and paper, these efforts come with a price tag. Will you help us cover our costs and reach our mid-month goal by making a donation right now if you can afford to? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Thank you so much!
secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Thank you!
Brittni McGuire, Communications Director, WVDP

Friend,
The Radical Left is FURIOUS that Congressman Van Drew is standing up for President Trump and fighting for a Strong America. And they are even more FURIOUS that he walked away from the Democrat party to DEFEND South Jersey.
**First, Nancy Pelosi tried to make Jeff obey the Democrat party ... it didn't work. **
**Then, a member of the Kennedy family dynasty tried to defeat Jeff ... it didn't work. **
**Now,** [**North Jersey Democrat Leader Bill Pascrell is trying to unseat Jeff.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XiI_57AJUphtpDo9VUdw8S4vL_ZSY7e0b4hHICDugTuTOq1JAxH5mC1QRf6Bw7IXjn2-WaUOxPHP4x_18kebdD84p27ICvlWpHTZoSnCFw9i2-hKKuFMEBNR--o6iMzpqleftFlsDwI-A5xt3juGfVrc7GEqE9fiYWTMoapuKWOXCVWeIHpgq2HOk--mU2S_LcEdeGFm1h_gSFbaZYM2syhNeIvyI-4B&c=J5PuGfclIY2ImunNxFD6FNj2t5IZ8Qbkaqd-uSEdoKb6OYgmFbc2gw==&ch=z2LtesFe4vbMMwerChdxXhCzMe8B8X4rP5OCH2jTN8K_IP0hRen6MA==)
Friend, join Team Van Drew to stand beside Republican Congressman Jeff Van Drew to show the Radical Left that Republicans won't be intimidated by their scare tactics. name: Team Kelly
subject: NIKKI HALEY TO JOIN KELLY LOEFFLER ON SENATE FIREWALL TOUR
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, DECEMBER 16, 2020
NIKKI HALEY TO JOIN KELLY LOEFFLER ON SENATE FIREWALL TOUR
ATLANTA - This Sunday, Former Ambassador to the United Nations Nikki Haley will join Senator Loeffler as a special guest on her statewide Senate Firewall Tour. Ambassador Haley and Senator Loeffler will hold events in Columbia, Habersham, and Forsyth counties to rally Georgia voters ahead of the January 5th runoff election.
"We are so excited to welcome Ambassador Nikki Haley back to the Peach State to campaign for Senator Loeffler," said Deputy Campaign Manager Stephen Lawson. "Ambassador Haley knows that the future of our country is at stake on January 5th, and she's going to continue helping us share Kelly's pro-growth, pro-jobs, pro-police, America First Agenda. The radical left wants to turn our country into a socialist state, which is why we need every single Georgian to listen to President Trump and get out and vote for Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue. We're proud to have Ambassador Haley with us on the ground in Georgia to stop socialism, protect the American Dream, and save our country on January 5th."

Click the links below to RSVP for the events.

"We are so excited to welcome Ambassador Nikki Haley back to the Peach State to campaign for Senator Loeffler," said Deputy Campaign Manager Stephen Lawson. "Ambassador Haley knows that the future of our country is at stake on January 5th, and she's going to continue helping us share Kelly's pro-growth, pro-jobs, pro-police, America First Agenda. The radical left wants to turn our country into a socialist state, which is why we need every single Georgian to listen to President Trump and get out and vote for Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue. We're proud to have Ambassador Haley with us on the ground in Georgia to stop socialism, protect the American Dream, and save our country on January 5th." Click the links below to RSVP for the events. | | Columbia County Rally Sunday, December 20th 1:00 PM Evans Towne Center Park Gazebo 7016 Evans Town Center Blvd. Evans, GA 30809 | | | == | Habersham County Rally Sunday, December 20th 3:15 PM Demorest Town Square 550 Georgia St. Demorest, GA 30535 | | | == | Forsyth County Rally with David Perdue Sunday, December 20th 5:30 PM Reid Barn 6844 Majors Rd. Cumming, GA 30040 | | | == | Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler | | Georgians for Kelly Loeffler | 9755 Dogwood Rd Suite 340, Roswell, GA 30075 | | Sent by mailto:stephen@kellyforsenate.com powered by

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund
subject: Volunteer today to stop Democrats from taking the Senate!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND
body:
| |
---
America needs volunteers to Save America and Secure the Senate now! If Democrats win the two Senate runoff races in Georgia, they will control the Senate. This simply cannot be allowed to happen.

_The election is on January 5th, but Georgia is already sending out absentee ballots – the same kinds of ballots that were the cause of the election fraud in the Presidential election!_

**The good news is that you can help Get Out The Vote (GOTV) for the Senate runoff races in Georgia from anywhere in the country!**

There are three ways you can volunteer. You can print out and send letters to voters (we have a prewritten letter you can use), you can text message voters, and you can call voters. See below for details on how to sign up for each activity.

Newt Gingrich recently said that Republicans have to turn out more votes than Stacey Abrams can steal, and that’s where you can help. By reaching as many likely Republican voters as possible, we can turn out enough votes to stop the Democrats from stealing these two Senate seats.

If we fail, and they are able to steal or win these seats legitimately, and Joe Biden is allowed to steal the Presidency, then the Democrats will have total control over the entire federal government. This means court packing, statehood for Puerto Rico and D.C. (which means four new Democrat Senators), the Green New Deal, socialized medicine, giving America away to China, and more.

_You and I must stop all of that from happening._

**Will you join the fight and volunteer to Save American and Secure the Senate?**

**SEND TEXT MESSAGES TO VOTERS**

**To get started go to: [tpp.us/txt](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzUxLTBiMTkwNjFhNWU3ZTQ0MDE5Y2U0ZTU2NDk5OWQ5NGMz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY2l0aXplbnNmdW5kL3RleHQydm90ZS90ZXh0Lz9taWQ9NDMxMzEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=wRHco_FOjf1wyauvlxzGKA)**– fill out the very short form and press the “Start Texting” button! We recommend using your phone to sign up as you will be using your phone to do the text messaging.

**You will get a text message after you’ve signed up.** Click the link on your cell phone and you’ll be moved through the process. Once you send a text to the voter, go back to your browser (on your cell phone) to send the next text.

If you need additional instructions [you can look through this guide](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzUxLTBiMTkwNjFhNWU3ZTQ0MDE5Y2U0ZTU2NDk5OWQ5NGMz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%&K=q2UNST7lBN1fbLzkIhYKAQ). But it is very easy to sign up and start texting voters now. You can text voters every day until 8:30pm ET.

**SEND LETTERS & CALL VOTERS**

If you’d like to send letters or call voters, [please sign up using this form,](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzUxLTBiMTkwNjFhNWU3ZTQ0MDE5Y2U0ZTU2NDk5OWQ5NGMz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvaXgzaUJUSHRYYjlQRzdyeDY_bWlkPTQzMTMxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=ls6kwckMk_ns3wlPupDy1Q) and we will contact you to get you started.

We cannot Save America and Secure the Senate without you, so please sign up to help Get Out The Vote today!

In liberty,

Jenny Beth
|
---

clean_body: | | America needs volunteers to Save America and Secure the Senate now! If Democrats win the two Senate runoff races in Georgia, they will control the Senate. This simply cannot be allowed to happen. The election is on January 5th, but Georgia is already sending out absentee ballots – the same kinds of ballots that were the cause of the election fraud in the Presidential election! The good news is that you can help Get Out The Vote (GOTV) for the Senate runoff races in Georgia from anywhere in the country! There are three ways you can volunteer. You can print out and send letters to voters (we have a prewritten letter you can use), you can text message voters, and you can call voters. See below for details on how to sign up for each activity. Newt Gingrich recently said that Republicans have to turn out more votes than Stacey Abrams can steal, and that’s where you can help. By reaching as many likely Republican voters as possible, we can turn out enough votes to stop the Democrats from stealing these two Senate seats. If we fail, and they are able to steal or win these seats legitimately, and Joe Biden is allowed to steal the Presidency, then the Democrats will have total control over the entire federal government. This means court packing, statehood for Puerto Rico and D.C. (which means four new Democrat Senators), the Green New Deal, socialized medicine, giving America away to China, and more. You and I must stop all of that from happening. Will you join the fight and volunteer to Save American and Secure the Senate? SEND TEXT MESSAGES TO VOTERS To get started go to: – fill out the very short form and press the “Start Texting” button! We recommend using your phone to sign up as you will be using your phone to do the text messaging. You will get a text message after you’ve signed up. Click the link on your cell phone and you’ll be moved through the process. Once you send a text to the voter, go back to your browser (on your cell phone) to send the next text. If you need additional instructions . But it is very easy to sign up and start texting voters now. You can text voters every day until 8:30pm ET. SEND LETTERS & CALL VOTERS If you’d like to send letters or call voters, and we will contact you to get you started. We cannot Save America and Secure the Senate without you, so please sign up to help Get Out The Vote today! In liberty, Jenny Beth | PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. © 2020 2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Suite 116-328 Woodstock, GA 30189 |

name: Greg Stanton
subject: Join me in supporting Jon Ossoff for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Friend,

January 5th marks Georgia's crucial run-off elections. Jon Ossoff is challenging incumbent Republican Senator David Perdue, and the winner could very well determine whether Joe Biden has a legislative majority in Congress, or if he will have to spend his first term in constant partisan gridlock with Mitch McConnell. [**Will you join me in helping push Jon over the finish line?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/t8CX0CynLhx_RJUlnLhXP5FgzTIyC29OmKPtHaPM1mI=/aCjE62Fh91nnOBLSawo9q5QrkWntVw3gWVnG5AcQkKI=?refcode=X_121120_StantonOssoff_A)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/t8CX0CynLhx_RJUlnLhXP5FgzTIyC29OmKPtHaPM1mI=/dr2pp7ZYdr-bwIKE4wsmcnGbjaxFcyJ2WRAOYOvis6k=?refcode=X_121120_StantonOssoff_A)

Jon is who Georgia needs representing them in Washington, and his voice in the Senate will be instrumental in helping us as a nation tackle everything from the COVID-19 pandemic to addressing climate change. I sincerely thank you for your continued support in empowering Democrats here in Arizona and across the country.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/t8CX0CynLhx_RJUlnLhXP5FgzTIyC29OmKPtHaPM1mI=/aCjE62Fh91nnOBLSawo9q5QrkWntVw3gWVnG5AcQkKI=?refcode=X_121120_StantonOssoff_A)

In solidarity,
_\--Greg_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress
---

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: SENATOR LOEFFLER ISSUES STATEMENT ON RAPHAEL WARNOCK'S REFUSAL TO ANSWER BASIC QUESTIONS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, DECEMBER 16, 2020
SENATOR LOEFFLER ISSUES STATEMENT ON RAPHAEL WARNOCK'S REFUSAL TO ANSWER BASIC QUESTIONS
ATLANTA - Today, Senator Loeffler issued the following statement on Raphael Warnock's refusal to answer basic questions on the campaign trail and the media's refusal to ask them:
"Are there any tough questions Raphael Warnock will answer -- and are there any reporters willing to ask them? "He refuses to say whether nor he renounces Marxism -- because his writings show he supports it. He refuses to say whether or not he supports packing the Supreme Court -- because he doesn't want Georgians to know that he does. And he refuses to say why he compared Israelis to 'birds of prey,' called Israel an 'apartheid state,' and called for an end to all U.S. military aid to Israel. "It's not just rhetoric that Warnock refuses to answer for -- it's his associations with dictators and anti-America radicals. He refuses to say whether or not he attended his church's event celebrating Fidel Castro -- because he did. He refuses to answer for his past praise of anti-American, anti-Semitic Jeremiah Wright and his 'God Damn America' agenda. He refuses to disavow Linda Sarsour, who called Jews 'satanic' and has moved to Georgia to campaign for Warnock. He refuses to clarify what he meant when he praised Louis Farrakhan and the Nation of Islam as 'important.' "And Warnock refuses to answer simple questions about a serious issue: His 2002 arrest for obstructing an investigation into child abuse at his summer camp. Warnock refuses to say what type of abuse occurred at his camp, he refuses to say why the police report called his behavior 'uncooperative and disruptive,' and he refuses to explain why there were widespread health violations at his camp -- which led to it being shut down. "Georgians deserve answers from Reverend Warnock about his record, rhetoric, and associations -- and his refusal to answer for them is deeply disturbing and disqualifying."
BACKGROUND:

* Warnock [said](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YwjJ-cmWQ3cOp0zbfewAUu0W3jBBXE9TV8HShfl_2QCQCrB_7Auokj3gCb40-HcHYaiHjCqx54fd76eOkkg-Ph-CM3hSMC4fMniVfByeHvorqbBkbPxcPgLoW074B8DMnSeFx8CnpyXgE5bcdvDfwxPE8Rm1tfDtXwYIkrHfi-IStwaEt2jO_SFn0pjMRLL7K_b_jB66vLA=&c=zcRvftwsxI4Twtaes437UiuF29-XNaJDzqlqPTTzoa721w8LPyFCcw==&ch=0YJjZMQQOpeuiJe8G062g4-I6wwNlC2d9zAeVD4aO9XnDXqxk-wG7Q==) Jeremiah Wright's "God Damn America" sermon is a "very fine homily on God and government."
* Warnock [criticized](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YwjJ-cmWQ3cOp0zbfewAUu0W3jBBXE9TV8HShfl_2QCQCrB_7Auokj3gCb40-HcH3IEnRS-au0TXfCTT4WdvO6IACfMbjnT7-8O-VR1xITQw4lGkLUJD6WwnnBBVjtdcYKBLuvuX7VwHmOY63dQEHQz1xUw4uXdnGTLqeIXVR0iPcX9wdvEThmT_yR0RGkPGZghngpztZnktbI4sVuFg7YwKfrTpqlqjZIeZkjL18_IGrP4_IGkk9Q==&c=zcRvftwsxI4Twtaes437UiuF29-XNaJDzqlqPTTzoa721w8LPyFCcw==&ch=0YJjZMQQOpeuiJe8G062g4-I6wwNlC2d9zAeVD4aO9XnDXqxk-wG7Q==) the Israeli government for "shooting down unarmed Palestinian sisters and brothers like birds of prey.
* Warnock [refused](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YwjJ-cmWQ3cOp0zbfewAUu0W3jBBXE9TV8HShfl_2QCQCrB_7AuokrMfb9Iy4ASQy39cPjzKTysfv7iacEr2KjXLG6az_ncUyPBZouP3bJy81iWJApnG-UeAsU8nFjm9mjiEcxKuSlV5tKK-LyXbF6YiQKNYjP0B4SKDUx4srPaQ3ee4xathnbdHuh5OWDFUoO5H5Cber5g=&c=zcRvftwsxI4Twtaes437UiuF29-XNaJDzqlqPTTzoa721w8LPyFCcw==&ch=0YJjZMQQOpeuiJe8G062g4-I6wwNlC2d9zAeVD4aO9XnDXqxk-wG7Q==) to answer whether or not he supports packing the Supreme Court with liberal justices.
* In reference to Jeremiah Wright, Warnock [stated](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YwjJ-cmWQ3cOp0zbfewAUu0W3jBBXE9TV8HShfl_2QCQCrB_7Auokj3gCb40-HcHCoaNqryJaUaQqar-xGcqKnRWOsaVj3zgChvUwpQkqA2CNGjaKdlcnkTTXxfdKO-ma5zllSqac6C8QljJLC8yxbHSmXBXQezckNvSqJWGHph4waBLUr2OAYjuV-wuNvQ8gFy2HO0lcOM=&c=zcRvftwsxI4Twtaes437UiuF29-XNaJDzqlqPTTzoa721w8LPyFCcw==&ch=0YJjZMQQOpeuiJe8G062g4-I6wwNlC2d9zAeVD4aO9XnDXqxk-wG7Q==), "We are happy to honor him...We celebrate Reverend Wright...He is a preacher and a prophet."
* Warnock [refused](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YwjJ-cmWQ3cOp0zbfewAUu0W3jBBXE9TV8HShfl_2QCQCrB_7AuokgoBGh3QdAqYGrwdO18Xj49fepxwr9Q4Wwj6D4xUey-qa4RHM0tdmHw92WFvvDRCk4X5fbMdgPqyTN8zsu2goi0yN-eGxBTHKfGaDmjJ-QibZyUx1Cz8D8cCeLL1LgvJPBZLXfBVAwQm&c=zcRvftwsxI4Twtaes437UiuF29-XNaJDzqlqPTTzoa721w8LPyFCcw==&ch=0YJjZMQQOpeuiJe8G062g4-I6wwNlC2d9zAeVD4aO9XnDXqxk-wG7Q==) to answer ANY questions about what happened during his year supervising Camp Farthest Out.
* Warnock [refused](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YwjJ-cmWQ3cOp0zbfewAUu0W3jBBXE9TV8HShfl_2QCQCrB_7Auokj3gCb40-HcHTf1cqGq03xew7YjSjfEZDgCge5ul7l_AJLsaqKTLPFiRAmrv3qf7jcvwrICI_EizxcnKutzteEygeSoaKVyckbrdohpaDTLkrpSclBOkerIL1Xoh-glPTUo_LVgTMjBe&c=zcRvftwsxI4Twtaes437UiuF29-XNaJDzqlqPTTzoa721w8LPyFCcw==&ch=0YJjZMQQOpeuiJe8G062g4-I6wwNlC2d9zAeVD4aO9XnDXqxk-wG7Q==) to say whether or not he attended his church's event celebrating Fidel Castro.
* Warnock [said](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YwjJ-cmWQ3cOp0zbfewAUu0W3jBBXE9TV8HShfl_2QCQCrB_7AuoksIIRRVTxq69XNPptHEydJQAqb3a45QGYKuOrycZc2MV6ysm7XWcKh43wSNMSOpIcTbzv7QXeUckOX5Dh1cacHMOChIjiM-yQ0sc3Bfv5n_ATuHtWJfvcEeXSH58inh9f0HMkut2gg6l-j0YhtpOKMWRBxe3tYIcLlpzCHMW43eN0FGhyVt96RcQ-B-8kOMdmQ==&c=zcRvftwsxI4Twtaes437UiuF29-XNaJDzqlqPTTzoa721w8LPyFCcw==&ch=0YJjZMQQOpeuiJe8G062g4-I6wwNlC2d9zAeVD4aO9XnDXqxk-wG7Q==) Dr. James Cone "spoke with the power and the moral authority of a prophet."
* Warnock [referred to](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YwjJ-cmWQ3cOp0zbfewAUu0W3jBBXE9TV8HShfl_2QCQCrB_7Auokjc5LHuylzOqgw3CTgri3zEf4k7y6a32zjqfG4WkScfXnThVatYTvtnS-a8joRudrx3BO9rxO0zr6av17hXf9NITauu1OtfM5apqquqry6Hz1xwDCdQ3cAUkBo8FJMoVR8-jU1pr8go78tFtdYZ4g9o=&c=zcRvftwsxI4Twtaes437UiuF29-XNaJDzqlqPTTzoa721w8LPyFCcw==&ch=0YJjZMQQOpeuiJe8G062g4-I6wwNlC2d9zAeVD4aO9XnDXqxk-wG7Q==) Israel as an "apartheid state."
* Warnock [called](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YwjJ-cmWQ3cOp0zbfewAUu0W3jBBXE9TV8HShfl_2QCQCrB_7Auoku7Pp74vdynzhk3Jc-bqTg_iejb2aNUf8qjgyaWdeTGD6lobrRwdHE1pJhVVsIZw0ELLcKM-7bk_BPQ8q8E9-_Az-ddogIVOfnoCPvsG3rqA6IP9zX4AoN1B5BRhwUjC1qzoWK-Ow_7olB49T-EDK_n6OT4lgZDftw==&c=zcRvftwsxI4Twtaes437UiuF29-XNaJDzqlqPTTzoa721w8LPyFCcw==&ch=0YJjZMQQOpeuiJe8G062g4-I6wwNlC2d9zAeVD4aO9XnDXqxk-wG7Q==) for an end to all U.S. military aid to Israel.
* While even Joe Biden has denounced Linda Sarsour, Warnock is [silent](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YwjJ-cmWQ3cOp0zbfewAUu0W3jBBXE9TV8HShfl_2QCQCrB_7Auokj3gCb40-HcHqlTxczeYCYmOW1-hqKb0LkhsIssmdcU4E_DVZxqAWJ533Vfu1brrH2q7zgrnT6YO3j-r8MkO59u0LdVu98-RFPGrNQ9_t2e39is7oAQLHckCJRC1ksHVw_RUA_6fMtcB0BznRRhmRxhZmnZHiwCeLPnJhrbmhxlNdqtPYvsHItPUR9YpWHatIQ==&c=zcRvftwsxI4Twtaes437UiuF29-XNaJDzqlqPTTzoa721w8LPyFCcw==&ch=0YJjZMQQOpeuiJe8G062g4-I6wwNlC2d9zAeVD4aO9XnDXqxk-wG7Q==) as she campaigns for him.
* Warnock [praised](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YwjJ-cmWQ3cOp0zbfewAUu0W3jBBXE9TV8HShfl_2QCQCrB_7Auokj3gCb40-HcHjpfEbzvShq6QhROR0uisF5iQwHCNrRzpJ1x5s99dwaiJwOq5cDzeKjHnR6DBV9nP-EOgFy2asKd7oN91ETdKTdFf-3vhnPUkeFqb7m8E2fEsV4HPYgzZNA==&c=zcRvftwsxI4Twtaes437UiuF29-XNaJDzqlqPTTzoa721w8LPyFCcw==&ch=0YJjZMQQOpeuiJe8G062g4-I6wwNlC2d9zAeVD4aO9XnDXqxk-wG7Q==) Louis Farrakhan's Nation of Islam.

He refuses to disavow Linda Sarsour, who called Jews 'satanic' and has moved to Georgia to campaign for Warnock. He refuses to clarify what he meant when he praised Louis Farrakhan and the Nation of Islam as 'important.' "And Warnock refuses to answer simple questions about a serious issue: His 2002 arrest for obstructing an investigation into child abuse at his summer camp. Warnock refuses to say what type of abuse occurred at his camp, he refuses to say why the police report called his behavior 'uncooperative and disruptive,' and he refuses to explain why there were widespread health violations at his camp -- which led to it being shut down. "Georgians deserve answers from Reverend Warnock about his record, rhetoric, and associations -- and his refusal to answer for them is deeply disturbing and disqualifying." BACKGROUND: Warnock == Jeremiah Wright's "God Damn America" sermon is a "very fine homily on God and government." Warnock == the Israeli government for "shooting down unarmed Palestinian sisters and brothers like birds of prey. Warnock == to answer whether or not he supports packing the Supreme Court with liberal justices. In reference to Jeremiah Wright, Warnock ==, "We are happy to honor him...We celebrate Reverend Wright...He is a preacher and a prophet." Warnock == to answer ANY questions about what happened during his year supervising Camp Farthest Out. Warnock == to say whether or not he attended his church's event celebrating Fidel Castro. Warnock == Dr. James Cone "spoke with the power and the moral authority of a prophet." Warnock == Israel as an "apartheid state." Warnock == for an end to all U.S. military aid to Israel. While even Joe Biden has denounced Linda Sarsour, Warnock is == as she campaigns for him. * Warnock == Louis Farrakhan's Nation of Islam. Stephen Lawson Deputy Campaign Manager mailto:stephen@kellyforsenate.com | Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler | | Georgians for Kelly Loeffler | 9755 Dogwood Rd Suite 340, Roswell, GA 30075 | | Sent by mailto:stephen@kellyforsenate.com powered by

name: =?utf-8?Q?JusticeDemocrats.com?=
subject: A huge announcement
body:
Did you see Bernie Sanders’ email last night? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/819f1bcb1c41/stephen-miller-must-go-3881066?e=c86b962a62)
---
| |
---
| | **Did you see the email from Bernie Sanders last night?** We wanted to bump it up to the top of your inbox this morning so you can read (or re-read!) what he had to say about taking on the political establishment and electing a new generation of progressive leadership: \--------------
From: Bernie Sanders
Subject: A huge announcement Peter, **Justice Democrats has done something incredible.** In just a few years, they have recruited and helped elect a strong, diverse, working-class group of progressives to the U.S. House of Representatives that includes Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush, and Jamaal Bowman. We’re building something that the political establishment hasn’t seen in decades. The truth is, they’re scared. And they should be. Here's the truth: It took tremendous resources and effort to recruit working-class, primary challengers like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush, and Jamaal Bowman. And Justice Democrats just launched their 2022 candidate recruitment efforts, setting a goal to raise $100,000 in the next 72 hours to challenge the establishment in Congress. That’s why I'm asking: [Will you join me in supporting Justice Democrats today with a contribution? Every contribution will help recruit more progressive candidates to challenge the political establishment and corporate elite.](https://justicedemocrats.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1808308b1db892bd20345fc2c&id=e1c11177f3&e=c86b962a62) **[Contribute](https://justicedemocrats.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1808308b1db892bd20345fc2c&id=8cd472bb3f&e=c86b962a62)** The unfortunate reality is that it takes a lot of money to run campaigns. That's why it's so extraordinary what the progressive movement has built together, with working people chipping in what they can to take on the billionaire class that wants to protect the status quo. The truth is that we are up against some very powerful special interests that have been at war with the working class for decades. I'm talking about Wall Street, the pharmaceutical industry, the health insurance industry, the fossil fuel industry, the military industrial complex, the private prison industrial complex and many profitable corporations who continue to exploit their employees. Progressive candidates recruited by Justice Democrats in the months ahead will be up against corporate-backed incumbents with unlimited sums of money. But we have something that they don't have, and that is a powerful movement of people who are saying enough is enough. It is time to elect candidates who will stand with working people, not the corporate elite. **If we’re going to find the next class of strong progressive candidates to run for Congress and advance our fight for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, racial justice, and an economy that works for everyone, Justice Democrats need your help.** It’s not easy to find the Bronx principal who’s ready to reform our broken criminal justice system, guarantee health care as a right, not a privilege, and ensure a quality education is available to all, no matter where you live or how much money your parents make. But Justice Democrats recruited Jamaal Bowman and helped him win a stunning upset victory in New York where he defeated a 16-term incumbent. It’s not easy to find the nurse and Black Lives Matter activist who’s ready to take her activism to Capitol Hill. But Justice Democrats recruited Cori Bush and helped her defeat a 10-term incumbent political machine in St. Louis. I’m so glad Jamaal and Cori will be joining me in Congress in just a few weeks — it’s a huge victory for our movement. But there is still much work to be done to recruit more progressive candidates who are ready to continue our collective struggle for justice and create a government that works for all of our people, not just the one percent. **That is why I hope you will join me today in supporting the Justice Democrats 2022 candidate recruitment launch.** Justice Democrats relies solely on grassroots donations to recruit and elect the strongest possible working-class progressive candidates to Congress. [Can you chip in to support the Justice Democrats candidate recruitment efforts and help them reach their $100,000 fundraising goal? I would not ask if it were not so important.](https://justicedemocrats.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1808308b1db892bd20345fc2c&id=aeb310bf19&e=c86b962a62) Your contribution today will give Justice Democrats the early funds it needs to take on the political establishment and elect more progressives candidates. Thank you for chipping in today if you can afford it. In solidarity, Bernie Sanders **[Contribute](https://justicedemocrats.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1808308b1db892bd20345fc2c&id=afeef49d4b&e=c86b962a62)**

| Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://justicedemocrats.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1808308b1db892bd20345fc2c&id=8749d2369c&e=c86b962a62) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://justicedemocrats.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1808308b1db892bd20345fc2c&id=6f24e91058&e=c86b962a62) and your state public health department.
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2020 Justice Democrats, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.
**Our mailing address is:**
Justice DemocratsPO Box 910Knoxville, TN 37901-0910
[Add us to your address book](https://justicedemocrats.us5.list-manage.com/vcard?u=1808308b1db892bd20345fc2c&id=9c15511cb4)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://justicedemocrats.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=1808308b1db892bd20345fc2c&id=9c15511cb4&e=c86b962a62) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://justicedemocrats.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1808308b1db892bd20345fc2c&id=9c15511cb4&e=c86b962a62&c=8bfddc3573).

---

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f7fb86c3bb21/tickets-ga-gop-defend-the-majority-rally-with-vice-president-pence-for-senators-david-perdue-and-kelly-loeffler-66987?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Early Voting Has Started, Georgia!**_
---
| **Folks,

GREAT NEWS - Vice President Mike Pence is coming back to Georgia!**

Don't miss your chance to see the Vice President in Columbus and Macon this Thursday, December 17.

**Columbus Defend The Majority Rally with Vice President Mike Pence**
_**Doors Open at 10:00 am
Program Begins at 12:00 pm**_
Columbus Airport
3250 W Britt David Rd
Columbus, GA, 31909
_Tickets available [HERE.](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=41b21f9a6e&e=02cd889ad3)_

**Macon Defend The Majority Rally with Vice President Mike Pence**
_**Doors Open at 12:00 pm
Program Begins at 2:00 pm**_
Middle Georgia Regional Airport
1000 Terminal Dr
Macon, GA, 31297
_Tickets available [HERE.](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=90c4cfb3f8&e=02cd889ad3)_

---
| _**Early voting is here!**_ Now through December 31, you can lock your vote in early at the polls. Don’t let anything stop you from participating in the most important election of our generation. Visit the [Georgia My Voter Page](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=e7e5e633d7&e=02cd889ad3) to find your early voting polling place.

Team Perdue kicked off early voting on Monday with a fly around across the state from Glynn County to Dalton.

_**Voting in Glynn County **_

_**In the News**_
---
| **PERDUE ON HANNITY →**

_"We are on a 125-stop tour of the state of Georgia around small towns. We have had bigger crowds [than Biden's today at] every single one of these stops - and I mean towns from Hahira to Hiawassee - than he did today._

...

_"We want Biden to keep coming down because he quietly told the Democrats to cool it on defunding the police, that that's a loser. Well they are denying that they want to defund the police. Here we've got two candidates - one running against Kelly Loeffler, one against me - that both want to defund the police. One of them is caught on video at an 'Abolish the Police' rally. The other says that they are gangsters and thugs. So these are two liberal Democrats that we are running against. They will be nothing but rubber-stamps for Chuck Schumer as he perpetrates his socialist agenda on America."_

**Click [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=5ecda43811&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch the full segment.**
_Click[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=9c78f6ad1b&e=02cd889ad3) to share on Facebook.
Click [here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=f7e4d46e40&e=02cd889ad3) to retweet._
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=9112e97e62&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| **PERDUE & LOEFFLER OP-ED → **

_It seems like every two years, you hear that this election is the most important election of our lifetimes, but this time it’s not a stretch to say that.

If the Democrats win Georgia’s two Senate seats on Jan. 5, the American Dream — one that’s fostered unrivaled prosperity through democracy and freedom over the last 244 years — could come to an abrupt end.

If you don’t know much about them, Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff are more than just far-left Democrats. Of course, they want to raise our taxes, enact the Green New Deal and socialize medicine. Like their cohorts, they support open borders, taking away our Second Amendment rights and legalizing late-term abortion, sending your tax dollars to fund abortions._ **Read the rest of their op-ed[ in the Washington Times](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=392226d81b&e=02cd889ad3). **
**TOM COTTON & KEN BUCK → ** _Their names may not appear on the ballot in Georgia’s runoff elections on January 5th, but House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, D-Calif., and Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer, D-N.Y., are the politicians Georgians really ought to consider as they cast their votes. The outcome of those two races will determine not only the majority in the Senate but also the direction of our nation. If Democrats win, then the next Senate Majority Leader will be Schumer. He’ll be able to work with Pelosi to implement one of the most far-left policy agendas the United States has ever seen._ **Read the rest of their op-ed[ on FoxNews.com](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=82d9e06f48&e=02cd889ad3). **
**THOM TILLIS ****→ **
_When control of the United States Senate is on the line, the Democrat machine in Washington spares no expense to get the power they so desperately crave.

After winning the most expensive Senate race in our country’s history in 2014 and then doing so again when I was re-elected in November, I have experienced their playbook first-hand.

Both former Sen. Harry Reid, D-Nev., and Sen. Chuck Schumer, D-N.Y., flooded North Carolina with false, negative ads against me in order to distract the people of my state from the failed liberal policies of the national Democratic party.

Schumer is now going back to the well in Georgia as he tries to buy the seats held by friends Sens. David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler.

Much like North Carolinians, Georgians will see right through this cynical strategy -- but only if conservatives do our part to get the word out about what is truly at stake in the January runoffs. _ **Read the rest of his op-ed [on FoxNews.com](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=3bf2c70dac&e=02cd889ad3). **
**[Breitbart](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=6d0df1192e&e=02cd889ad3) : Georgia Sheriff: Jon Ossoff’s Immigration Policies Could Get Georgians ‘Killed’** _Gwinnett County Sheriff Butch Conway said during a press conference Tuesday that Georgia Senate Democrat candidate Jon Ossoff’s immigration policies could get Georgians killed.

The Georgia sheriff said that Georgians will be endangered when local law enforcement can no longer cooperate with ICE.

“I’m a very staunch supporter of 287(g), and I understand it’s going to be gone when I leave December 31. And, I’m sad about that because Gwinnett County is going to suffer, people are going to suffer,” he said.

“There will be people killed in Gwinnett by illegal aliens that could have been deported the last time, that could have been arrested. But, they’re going to be set back into the community to do more harm,” he added._ '

body:
Californians also pay some of the highest taxes in the nation -- with little to show for it. That's why we need to know, %%First Name%%: Do you feel overtaxed?
****

.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HrXTcpjBUSXDT_jvc2AzZmAen4z7pDFBuqYwh-evrS4nVSudVjwjAL7NE4_1uqGRz2vcB57vN2AlpxH5NWem6rZy0i_7oE0Yr0dNkd6KSD9MUe2xDT4xs7qxx6G8QMZRHTnlAoriDvEagN9jbdFxCo16KI_VJSjsZi1U95Q1RGSdEmBV8k5na7vyXxTYD9a-OC2QJKyqzYVzbgIhHY-9DSE9j3XaA6Si_tmShmsMDtFzCVjuk9x6Ymft1TlRiWgj_r5_KchplD5jQ0WPLmTPSLKJ8iq03rFNMP29vpFv9yCVyf6GvjkLmX8F0mCo_ihN52rXoAum_wbpaa6P1wWoKtLhO3s94d_GuxbnjokDQq_RN8NPizkOxtddfEoiDLiV_bQ48d3fCF4=&c=P6BVddvf4O6IujmBmR0AV9UDaom1nocptF73D4hUSSNTFP5fNvghog==&ch=K2dVx88DBvzMnrFYw-jPCp0IzB8GqS-eWL5toh56cZ-M4o4OSYBXFg==)
_Gas tax.
Sales tax.
Use tax.
Bed tax.
Payroll tax.
Income tax.
Property tax._

Not only has California put fees and taxes on everything, but Californians also pay some of the highest taxes in the nation -- _with little to show for it._ That's why we need to know, Friend: [**Do you feel overtaxed?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HrXTcpjBUSXDT_jvc2AzZmAen4z7pDFBuqYwh-evrS4nVSudVjwjAL7NE4_1uqGRS82oe9sOu9y49xaDc0fsVBoO9vGtO2R3sQlpMB2xoWpsO708Q1XOzh8zrHu9G99AYdHmUzgS-IGHZ2U5Lym1O9EHl9IvFww3ziCrm3Ubv8O7M0wd11B4GKJ9G_-QiCvr51oPRy6dVCSfL7udtGm3xvXQHlP6llH7o3M3rhCuFjBAdOCRb1uSLqmYV5BmJzWtat3G1gyfvY25BtQZsPJFNA5bvz6n08Tv5exhJ49N1AmPrAD1HvOS7TmVC8A6QnVNazm-PSrZOe-IXQYTOyWEBADHMueVFDZ8qu58SKkTcxUj_k61f-sKXB7EQ67TBt4v5K70giSDhq8=&c=P6BVddvf4O6IujmBmR0AV9UDaom1nocptF73D4hUSSNTFP5fNvghog==&ch=K2dVx88DBvzMnrFYw-jPCp0IzB8GqS-eWL5toh56cZ-M4o4OSYBXFg==)

California's middle class is being taxed into extinction. Lifelong Californians and hardworking families are fleeing to tax-havens like Idaho and Texas. Even businesses are leaving the Golden State and taking their jobs with them.

So please, Friend, [**take the one-minute tax survey to let us know what you think of California 's taxes!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HrXTcpjBUSXDT_jvc2AzZmAen4z7pDFBuqYwh-evrS4nVSudVjwjAL7NE4_1uqGRS82oe9sOu9y49xaDc0fsVBoO9vGtO2R3sQlpMB2xoWpsO708Q1XOzh8zrHu9G99AYdHmUzgS-IGHZ2U5Lym1O9EHl9IvFww3ziCrm3Ubv8O7M0wd11B4GKJ9G_-QiCvr51oPRy6dVCSfL7udtGm3xvXQHlP6llH7o3M3rhCuFjBAdOCRb1uSLqmYV5BmJzWtat3G1gyfvY25BtQZsPJFNA5bvz6n08Tv5exhJ49N1AmPrAD1HvOS7TmVC8A6QnVNazm-PSrZOe-IXQYTOyWEBADHMueVFDZ8qu58SKkTcxUj_k61f-sKXB7EQ67TBt4v5K70giSDhq8=&c=P6BVddvf4O6IujmBmR0AV9UDaom1nocptF73D4hUSSNTFP5fNvghog==&ch=K2dVx88DBvzMnrFYw-jPCp0IzB8GqS-eWL5toh56cZ-M4o4OSYBXFg==)

| Patriot,
Election integrity is not just about who won in 2020: it is about where our country is headed and the faith the people have in our election system. Kat is passionate about honesty and integrity in our government.
Watch her interview with Fox below:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019JtPfCkn_ycoDBAqXLKpvo21cu5hpe_qMEgfXbG9jGGQ_sqn-OybkK87BgGqQlg_C3xRzJHSwCLEcQqDUcmPv9nURzsaMztclX_e9YRJsehxtAZw4EQzxdUUco_gfbhu-PBr_-IiWUxkf-qDTDvYtuCjKGvc8L2FNAtdTJ0tUzeOi3yavzIaA61vGOEGPMLf03I-qZlcyag=&c=7td_FU-qX5UDLwDJGWSUwSLIsXsvjsb9uYkJhhSgnR5fvPKjGHPt_A==&ch=Ic_4pOFn85urzEL8m8QM9VOFTSDVgS_rEFPnx9D1C6_1EYcvXp-Mjw==)
---
| The amount of irregularities in counties and states across the country is alarming. There needs to be accountability for fraudulent actions because the people deserve a fair election process.
As Kat said herself, "This is not a Republican issue or a Democrat issue. This is an American issue."
If the people do not have confidence in the system, then we are facing a battle that is impossible to win. This is why we need your support. We need you to speak up, to spread awareness, and to stand with us as we fight for the American people.

clean_body: We must take action | | | | | | == | Patriot, Election integrity is not just about who won in 2020: it is about where our country is headed and the faith the people have in our election system. Kat is passionate about honesty and integrity in our government. Watch her interview with Fox below: | == | The amount of irregularities in counties and states across the country is alarming. There needs to be accountability for fraudulent actions because the people deserve a fair election process. As Kat said herself, "This is not a Republican issue or a Democrat issue. This is an American issue." If the people do not have confidence in the system, then we are facing a battle that is impossible to win. This is why we need your support. We need you to speak up, to spread awareness, and to stand with us as we fight for the American people. | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Kat, along with 24 of her freshman colleagues, have drafted a letter to Speaker Pelosi urging her to take action on this investigation as passionately as she has investigated other matters in the past. | | | == | The integrity of our election is at stake, and the American people deserve answers and accountability. == | | | == | With your help, we can defeat Socialism, defend our Constitution, and PUT AMERICA FIRST! Thank you for your support, Team Kat | | | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

---

| Peter,
Recently on Fake News CNN, my colleagues and I were named to the network's "Cult Caucus," all for being a loyal defender of President Trump.
They see this as a shot at me, but I am extremely proud to defend our amazing President and fight for his policies that work for the American people first.
CNN is only trying to divide us as they create "enemies" of the liberal elite who watch their channel. They will lie to their audience and censor stories that hurt Democrats, all while saying they are "defenders of democracy." They are the enemy of the people, and their lies and division of our country must stop.
---

name: Mark Warner for Virginia
subject: Just plain stupid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Sign the petition: No more government shutdowns
|
---

| | Derek,

We all remember what a disaster the government shutdown was for Virginia, for our federal workers and contractors, and for our country. Unfortunately, if the White House and Congress can't get their act together and pass a spending bill in the next few days, there's a chance of another government shutdown happening this month.

**Mark Warner is working hard in the Senate to prevent another shutdown from inflicting more financial pain on Virginians -- _especially_ in the middle of a pandemic -- and he needs your help right now.** **[Sign Mark's petition to demand the outgoing Trump administration and Congress pass a bi-partisan deal to prevent another shutdown.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d970/53d9897e/553afcdc/1c88d7db/3046563249/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-shutdown")** Back in January 2019, in the midst of the last shutdown, Mark Warner introduced the "Stop Shutdowns Transferring Unnecessary Pain and Inflicting Damage in the Coming Years Act," or the Stop STUPIDITY Act.

The bill is simple: If the president and Congress can't reach a deal to fund the government, then _they_ shut down; but the rest of our government stays open to continue serving the people. That's the way it should be.

But right now, we need to make sure the federal government doesn't shut down due to a lack of funding in the middle of a pandemic. That's why Mark is fighting for a bi-partisan deal to keep the government open and provide relief for those impacted by the virus.

**[Add your name to Sen. Warner's petition calling on the White House and Congress to pass a bi-partisan deal and prevent a government shutdown.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d970/53d9897e/553afcdc/1c88d7db/3046563249/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-shutdown")**

Thank you,
Team Warner | [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d970/53d9897e/553afcdc/1c88d7da/3046563249/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk1NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20201216_p_1_fl__956__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d970/53d9897e/553afcdc/1c88d7d9/3046563249/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Foundation
subject: Do you support Cruz’s Keep Nine Amendment? Fill out this survey!
body:
| |
---
Do you support keeping the Supreme Court at nine seats?

**[I need you to fill out a quick survey](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzUxLWUxNDM1NjFlYzEwZjRjZTBiYzg3OWE2NGVhMDAyNDgz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvV2pUV3Z5M2RxSGtqbkRNZkE_bWlkPTQzMTMyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=kteZ3Gz1ETAB7fnzqvJ35w) letting me know if you support Sen. Cruz's H.J. Res. 76, known as the “Keep Nine” Amendment to the U.S. Constitution to ban Supreme Court packing.**

It simply says:

_“The Supreme Court of the United States shall be composed of nine Justices.”_

Senators Ted Cruz, Thom Tillis, Roger Wicker, Kelly Loeffler, David Perdue, Steve Daines, Rob Portman, Joni Ernst, Tom Cotton, John Boozman, Mike Lee, Bill Cassidy, Chuck Grassley, and Cindy Hyde-Smith announced support and proposed the KeepNine Amendment.

For more details, see the [KeepNine website.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzUxLWUxNDM1NjFlYzEwZjRjZTBiYzg3OWE2NGVhMDAyNDgz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9rZWVwbmluZS5vcmcvP21pZD00MzEzMiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=IVLkET-9lEWH_-Gu_-r_lw)

**Then,[be sure to fill out our survey!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzUxLWUxNDM1NjFlYzEwZjRjZTBiYzg3OWE2NGVhMDAyNDgz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvV2pUV3Z5M2RxSGtqbkRNZkE_bWlkPTQzMTMyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=plsw9BmVnn40iTrbAJDHrA)** We need to know if local leaders like you support this, so that we can support it publicly!

In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzUxLWUxNDM1NjFlYzEwZjRjZTBiYzg3OWE2NGVhMDAyNDgz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm91bmRhdGlvbi9kb25hdGU_bWlkPTQzMTMyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=dRY3IQ9jOkB9p8vH72CBIg)

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Here's the thing:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Team,
Senator Murray said I could reach out today about my must-win Senate runoff race in Georgia.
In too many ways to count, **the growth of corporate power in our political system has meant that working families and ordinary people are being left behind.**
For decades now, working people in this country have been forced into financial precarity:
* Wages for the middle class have been falling behind.
* The Republican-controlled Senate has refused to raise the minimum wage to $15.
* And costs for things like tuition and health care keep going up.

******[We need to turn this trend around NOW. So today I'm asking for your support. Will you chip in $5 or more right now to support my campaign and Patty Murray?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-201215-ossoff?refcode=em201215i_554&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
We don't have to live in a country where hardworking families can just barely make ends meet, or where the possibility of a bad health diagnosis raises the specter of bankruptcy.
We can deliver a government that works for the people -- all people. **We can deliver Health, Jobs, and Justice for the people.**
**[That's why I'm asking for your support today. So right now, please chip in whatever you can to my campaign and Patty Murray to help me take this fight all the way to the Senate.](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-201215-ossoff?refcode=em201215i_554&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you for standing with me,
Jon Ossoff

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-201215-ossoff?refcode=em201215i_554&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****
** **

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let us know if you would like to [unsubscribe](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a69330f/22080b68/79cbe590/46022020/1454553564/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "http://act.pattymurray.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join us today in fighting for progressive values and resisting Trump's agenda: [donate now](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a69330f/22080b68/79cbe590/46022027/1454553564/VEsD/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-emailfooter?recurring=yes").
